nasb.text: I delivered you from the hands of the Egyptians and from the hands of all your oppressors, and dispossessed them before you and gave you their land,

esv.text: And I delivered you from the hand of the Egyptians and from the hand of all who oppressed you, and drove them out before you and gave you their land.

cnv.text: 我曾經把你們從埃及人的手拯救出來，拯救你們脫離所有欺壓你們的人的手，把他們從你們面前趕走，把他們的地賜給你們。

ccb.text: 将你们从埃及人及一切欺压者的手中拯救出来，为你们赶走敌人，把他们的土地赐给你们。’
